response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance by Hololive ID members Moona Hoshinova, Kureiji Ollie, and Pavolia Reine. 2. Identified 'Victory to the World' by P*Light via on-screen text at the start. 3. Used lyrics fragments from the second song '雨味少女' (Ame-aji Shoujo) found through searches to identify it. 4. Obtained lyrics for '雨味少女' through the search tool. 5. 'Victory to the World' is primarily an electronic track; vocal lyrics are not standard and are mostly vocal chops, noted as such. 6. Structured the final response into JSON.
response.global_summary: A high-energy performance featuring Hololive Indonesia members (Moona Hoshinova, Kureiji Ollie, Pavolia Reine) performing two songs: 'Victory to the World' by P*Light and 'Ame-aji Shoujo' by Mikkel. The performance includes dance and vocal elements with stage lighting and visual effects.
